form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split but had to be content with second when clocking 23.20 over 411m at Casino. Has run hot time here with a 19.52 PB at the distance. Key chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (23.38) at Casino over 411m. More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at this track last start over 350m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 300m at Taree Super Track. That followed a win two back in 17.15 beating Malmsteen over 300m at Casino. This will test.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 350m in 19.82 last start, beating Most Determined. Strongly fancied last time and lived right up to expectations. Stick with her.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at The Gardens over 400m. Last start finished 6th on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind You Never Lose beaten 10 lengths (23.71) in a Grade 4/5. Has ability and worth including.
